title: Vegetable Broccoli Crunch
description: A rich and flaky mexican dish featuring chinese broccoli that can be enjoyed as a post-workout snack or meal, vegetarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: Jalapeno Peppers, seeded and finely chopped

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and red onion; sauté until translucent.
Fold in jalapeno slices, cooking until soft and slightly caramelized.
Rinse the Chinese broccoli under cold water to remove any excess dirt. Cut into florets or leave whole if preferred.
Sauté the broccoli with a pinch of salt until tender but still crisp.
Stir in Mexican cheese blend, allowing it to melt gently on top of the broccoli and onions.
Drizzle with sour cream on top and garnish with fresh cilantro just before serving.
Serve warm as an accompaniment or as a standalone snack.
